summary: The user plans to start a podcast titled "Bull vs. Bear: Two Guys, One Whatsapp Group, No Clue," featuring two old friends, Michael and Billy, who debate investment ideas despite lacking expertise. The podcast aims to provide a humorous take on personal finance through their lively and absurd arguments.
facts: The user is starting a podcast featuring two friends, Michael and Billy, who have known each other for over twenty years. Michael believes the world is going to fall in and you should have your money in cash. Billy thinks markets will have ups and downs and you just need to stay invested for the long term and ignore the news. The podcast is titled "Bull vs. Bear: Two Guys, One Whatsapp Group, No Clue." The podcast will feature humorous debates based on real-life experiences and personal finance misadventures. The user requested ten names for the podcast and a summary appealing to personal finance enthusiasts. The final summary emphasizes the lack of expertise of the hosts while highlighting their entertaining discussions.
